data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of allowing staff to edit or override agent memory. However, the evidence does not include any specific API reads or checks that confirm this functionality is implemented or accessible. The linked use case mentions the need for this capability but lacks concrete evidence demonstrating its existence, indicating a clear gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or mechanisms that allow staff to edit or override agent memory.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Define API for editing agent memory
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that staff can successfully edit or override agent memory through the API.
